reference: My name is Eric M. Boafo. I have been affected by the Hepatitis B virus and have taken the Hepatitis B virus profile. I went to the hospital and a doctor prescribed Livolin Forte for me, but another doctor at my institute said Livolin is not for Hepatitis B patients. In this case, what should I do? Can you please prescribe a medication for me?
text: My name is Eric M. Boafo. I have been affected by the hepatitis B virus and have taken the hepatitis B virus profile. I went to the hospital and a doctor prescribed levulin four pay for me. But another doctor at my institute said levulin is not for hepatitis B patients. In this case, what should I do? Can you please prescribe a medication for me?
